updated_hint: Review monthly or before important artifact work.

pptx.name: presentations:Presentations
pptx.why: Built-in editable PowerPoint / Google Slides deck creation and editing skill. Prefer for one-off or straightforward deck work.

docx.name: documents:documents
docx.why: Built-in DOCX / Word document creation, editing, redline, and visual QA skill.

pdf.name: pdf:pdf
pdf.why: Built-in PDF extraction, rendering, inspection, creation, and verification skill.

xlsx.name: spreadsheets:Spreadsheets
xlsx.why: Built-in spreadsheet creation, analysis, formulas, charts, and formatting skill.

pptx.name: awesome-ai-ppt
pptx.why: Curated AI PPT and PowerPoint automation index with an installable skill. Install as a discovery helper, not as proof that every linked project is approved.

pptx.name: ppt-master
pptx.why: High-quality native editable PowerPoint workflow for repeated PPTX creation/editing tasks.

pptx.name: frontend-slides
pptx.why: High-signal HTML-first slide skill for animated/source-editable web presentations and PowerPoint-to-web workflows.

pptx.name: academic-pptx-skill
pptx.why: Academic presentation skill focused on argument structure, action titles, chart discipline, citations, and PPTX output.

document_artifacts.name: markdown-exporter
document_artifacts.why: Agent skill and CLI for exporting Markdown to PPTX, DOCX, HTML, and PDF with templates.

document_artifacts.name: paperjsx-agent-skill
document_artifacts.why: Structured generation of PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF artifacts; useful if it passes current structure and safety checks.

resume.name: tailored-resume-generator
resume.why: Curated Codex skill for tailoring resumes against a target role and ATS-relevant keywords.

pptx_optional.name: pptx
pptx_optional.license_hint: Check upstream license terms before use
pptx_optional.why: Strong PPTX workflow reference; install only if license and platform fit the user's environment.
